history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person sits with their legs spread wide, wearing a black t-shirt and a grey hooded sweatshirt with the word "BLAST" visible on it in black lettering. They are also wearing very wide-leg, dark wash denim jeans with frayed hems and black sneakers with white soles. The person is partially obscuring their face with their right hand, and a faint wisp of smoke or vapor is visible around their head. They are sitting on a low ledge in front of a large, grey, industrial-looking metal door set into a corrugated metal wall. To the left of the door, there's a vertical poster or banner with repeating text that reads "MC HOME DEPOT" in a light grey, stylized font. The overall lighting is somewhat dim, with a strong shadow of the person cast on the wall to their right, suggesting a light source from the front and slightly to the left. The color palette is muted, dominated by greys, blacks, and dark blues, with the white lettering on the poster providing a subtle contrast. The mood is casual, slightly edgy, and urban. The style is reminiscent of street photography or fashion photography with an urban backdrop.
